column1: Table 1.  Mass loss of *Larrea tridentata* litter under reduced or near-ambient solar UV-B at the balcony and desert sites. Three types of litter were assessed: *leaves* only, *twigs* only, or a full *mixture* of leaves, twigs, and seeds. Values are means +/- SE, expressed as a percent loss of initial mass. P-values refer to the UV-B treatment effect within a site and litter type.
